pr.title: Record: SLOT-24 + Partial Depth Recurrence — val_bpb     0.8648 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: SLOT-24 fine-tunes per-sample hidden deltas/logit bias on an XSA-11 base stacked with partial depth recurrence and per-iteration conditioning.
output.valOnlyReasoning: SLOT-24 optimizes per-sample deltas/logit bias on the validation shard with frozen model weights.
techniques: Partial depth recurrence (layers 4,5) with iter_embed/iter_gate conditioning
SLOT-24 per-sample hidden delta and logit-bias optimization
XSA-11 backbone with QK-Gain, VRL, BigramHash enhancements
